feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: GL Account name language issue in FBL1N line item
entry.content: Login SAP Production system in Chinese, go to FBL1N vendor line item, enter vendor 1300, company code 1000, other parameters keep default values and execute F8, you can see the name of GL account 2202010100 is English name instead of Chinese name, because we maintained GL account master name both in Chinese and English, suppose it should display English name of account,  high appreciated if someone tell me the reason why.

entry.title: Catalogs and Groups for FIORI Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently using catalogs and groups design for FIORI launchpad in s/4HANA 2022 FP01. 

We are planning to upgrade to S/4HANA 2025 FPS01, and we are aware that SAP recommends moving to spaces and pages.

We would like to know if FIORI Launchpad in S/4HANA 2025 FPS01 will support the catalogs and groups layout? This is being asked to have an understanding of technical compatibilty so that we can plan for moving to spaces and pages before the upgrade or after the upgrade.

 

We have refered to this already -
https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/a7b390faab1140c087b8926571e942b7/46bfe098b96e4924a26d4b52449e8cb2.html

S- note: 3148424 - mentions support in S/4HANA 2023 but no information available about 2025

entry.title: Make Optional Check number field for F-36 transaction
entry.content: We want to make the check number field as optional for f-36 transaction . we have even checked note no 3531338  system says it cannot be implemented.

entry.title: Umschalten zwischen Spaces und Groups Launchpad - Parameter SPACES_ENABLE_USER
entry.content:
Wir bauen Schritt für Schritt unser Gruppen-Launchpad auf die neue Bereiche, Seiten und Abschnitte UI Sicht um. dabei wird beabsichtigt dem Nutzer selbst zu ermöglichen auf das neue Menü umzustellen, sofern es für seinen Bereich fertig gestellt wurde. Dazu möchten wir den Standard-Einstieg für den Benutzer auf dem Gruppenmenü belassen und dem Benutzer ermöglichen individuell auf das Bereichsmenü umzuschalten.

Die Parameter SPACES und SPACES_ENABLE_USER sitzen wie folgt:
SPACES = false
SPACES_ENABLE_USER = true

Erwartet würde von mir, das der Benutzer bei der ersten Anmeldung nach dem Setzen dieser Parameter auf seinem Launchpad im bisherigen und von uns gepflegten Gruppenmenü angemeldet wird und die Möglichkeit hat sich auf Wunsch auf Spaces und Pages umzustellen. Erst nach dieser individuellen Umstellung sollte dann für Folgeanmeldungen das Bereichsmenü direkt angezeigt werden.

Das Systemverhalten ist jedoch anders.
Das erste Anmelden ist abhängig von Usereinstellungen, die vor der Freigabe der Bereichsmenüs bereits vorliegen, hatte der Benutzer vor der true-Schaltung bereits mit Bereichen experimentiert, sieht er direkt Bereiche statt d

entry.title: Need SAP Note for S4 HANA similar to 1722312
entry.content: We are trying to update schedule line category in sales order from CN to CP via BAPI Sales order change, but when CP is updated the re- ATP check doesn't performs automatically. We found related problem SAP note below but this is only applicable for ECC version and out system is S4 HANA 2021 version- 1722312 - No order scheduling performed for BAPI SALESORDER CHANGE. Please advise suitable SAP Note for HANA version to implement the changes.

entry.title: Error Automatic Credit Memo - Advance Returns to Suppliers
entry.content:
When a return to suppliers is performed and a replacement material is received. The automatic Credit Note to close the process have an error: "M8080 Reversal Quantity greater that invoiced quantity to Date"

The Best Practice BMK, indicates that the Credit Memo is created automatically once the replacement material is received.

entry.title: sapui5 - updating the bootstrap to release 1.149 / 1.150
entry.content:
My apologies ahead of time, but I am looking for the note containing the TCI for those UI5 update(s).  I've looked at 3155948 - ABAP SAPUI5 patch version update, following the instructions under "Solution", but can not find any relevant note for the updates.  I've also searched other notes/documentation, but I still can't find a thing.

This request is because of a notification we received under SAP event ID:  EVB13291295

Thank you for your time.

Herman

entry.title: AP Aging Report (IDCNAP/IDCNAR) – Enhancement Request to Aggregate by G/L Account
entry.content:
In the IDCNAP and IDCNAR Aging Report applications, the report results are currently grouped based on the selected Segment. As a result, the same G/L Account appears multiple times whenever it is associated with different suppliers or line items.

The business requirement is to have an option to aggregate/group the report by G/L Account, so that each G/L Account is displayed only once with the total balance, instead of showing duplicate G/L Account entries.

Currently, there is no standard option available in the report to group or subtotal the data by G/L Account.

entry.title: Force password change for Dialog user IDs on next login due to security policy change
entry.content:
Due to a change in Security policy, we have to force all the dialog user IDs to change the password in the next login. Is there any option available to force password change for Dialog user IDs on next login without a system restart?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest API throws error " BP Exist " while updating existing BP
entry.content:
Hi

We are using this API " BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest API " and updating existing BP but throwing error " BP Exist ".

 

Thanks,

Naga

entry.title: How to archive FI and CO documents with WBS elements in S/4HANA ?
entry.content:
Business requirement to archive FI, CO documents that involve WBS elements in S/4HANA. The process involves archiving WBS elements using the PS_PROJECT archiving object and related CO line items via CO_TRANS. Proper mapping and handling of WBS element numbers are crucial, especially in environments like Central Finance.

My help, but no explication for subledger part : https://learning.sap.com/courses/configuring-additional-settings-in-financial-accounting-in-sap-s-4hana/executing-data-archiving-for-specific-fi-objects

Business requires guidance on the steps, necessary configurations, and any relevant notes or best practices to ensure consistent and complete archiving.

entry.title: 資産振替処理を実施した際の振替元資産と振替先資産のデータ状況について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

AS01→ABUMNで資産振替を実施しました。

※振替元資産の資本化日付・初回取得日：5/31、振替日付：6/30

※取得価額：263,000円、耐用年数：5年、償却額：3,933円

処理実行後の振替元資産／振替先資産のデータ状況を確認してみると、以下の点が気になります。

【振替元資産】

・1ヶ月分の償却を反映した232,067円が貸方に計上されているが、借方に3,867円が計上。

・今年度の残りの償却額に656円が設定されており、毎月65円or66円の償却が発生する。

・2031年度まで償却が発生するスケジュールになっている。

【振替先資産】

・1ヶ月分の償却を反映した232,067円が借方に計上されているが、貸方に3,867円が計上。

・償却額が振替元資産の3,933円から3,868円になっている。

　※ユーザには償却額の計算式は「取得価額 × 耐用年数に対する償却係数(5年だと0.2) ÷ 12」である事を説明済み。

ユーザ側は以下を希望されていますが、対応可能な内容でしょうか。

・振替元資産の今年度の月65円or66円の償却額の発生をなくしたい。

・振替先資産の償却額を振替元資産と同じく3,933円にしたい。

画面資料をご確認頂いた上で、仕様のご説明をお願い致します。

entry.title: The difference between value of MM – FI (Transaction Code MB5B and F.08)
entry.content: Mentioned in the Enclosed document

entry.title: OBPM4 – Company Code Not Visible for Payment Medium Format Despite Configuration Being Maintained
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in transaction OBPM4 (Payment Medium: Selection Variants), where one specific company code is not available/visible for configuration, while the other company codes are displayed correctly.

The payment medium format ZVIR_ACC_CGI_XML_CT is configured and assigned in APM configuration. The corresponding DMEE format for Virtual Accounts has also been maintained.

entry.title: Default value not showing in Fiori App
entry.content:
When I set default values for plant Q201, in Fiori launchpad.
Open Display work center application
Plant is not coming by default even after saving the default value as Plant Q201

entry.title: IW21 Notification app on the SAP Fiori Launchpad is not mobile responsive.
entry.content: Transaction IW21 (Create Maintenance Notification) has been added to the SAP Fiori Launchpad via a custom tile using a custom application ID. When accessed from mobile devices (smartphones/tablets), the application does not adapt to the screen size and is not responsive. Users are required to scroll horizontally to view the full content of the screen.

entry.title: Header-Level Cost Distribution for Partial Goods Receipt
entry.content:
We need to open a raise ticket with SAP before the end of the day regarding a spare parts purchasing scenario.Business Scenario:

  • A Purchase Order (PO) was created for 100 spare parts.
  • Only 80 items have been delivered and will be received through a partial Goods Receipt (GR).

Requirement:
We need to distribute the header-level costs (such as planned delivery costs or other header charges) only across the 80 received items, rather than allocating the costs to all 100 PO items.Could you please advise whether there is a standard SAP solution to achieve this at the header level, without manually distributing the costs at the item level

entry.title: Putaway bin proposal for multiple fixed bins
entry.content:
During the fixed bin putaway scenario, if a product has multiple fixed bins assigned, our standard understanding is that the system proposes the bin that comes first based on the sort sequence.

However, our requirement is that when multiple fixed bins are assigned to a particular product, the bin that was added first in the /scwm/binmat should be proposed for putaway, instead of the bin determined by the sort sequence.

Kindly confirm whether this behavior is supported in standard functionality. Also, please let us know if there is any BAdI or enhancement option available to achieve this requirement.


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  • Check the sort sequence maintained for the fixed bins in storage type X.
  • In /SCWM/BINMAT, assign multiple fixed bins to the same product for the particular st type.
  • Ensure the fixed bins are created at different times so that each assignment has a different creation timestamp. In a test case, BIN6 was assigned first, followed by BIN2, BIN4, etc.
  • Create the inbound delivery for the product.
  • Create the putaway Warehouse Task (WT) for the inbound delivery.Observe the destination bin proposed by the system:
  • Actual Result: The system proposes BIN2, which has the smallest sort sequence among the assigned fixed bins.
  • Expected Result: The system should propose BIN6, as it was the first fixed bin assigned to the product in /SCWM/BINMAT, regardless of the sort sequence.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Personal Settings in ME21N etc. (Tab. ESDUS) empty after conversion
entry.content:
Hello,

Our R/3 system has been converted to an S/4HANA sandbox system.
Unfortunately, the personal settings for MM transactions, which are stored in table ESDUS, are no longer available after the conversion.
I could not find any documentation stating that this is standard behavior.

Is there a standard SAP procedure, report, or migration tool available to transfer or restore ESDUS entries during or after an S/4HANA system conversion?

Many thanks!

entry.title: Ability to Ship Quality Stock from Plant to Plant
entry.content: Is there any solution to ship Quality Stock from our 3PL to another plant? Are there any standard or customization process in SAP that allow us to move stock type quality from plant to plant.
